feed.title: SAP Community - User Interface
feed.subtitle: User Interface Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: custom.css not loaded in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello together,

we created a custom theme. The theme designer shows the the custom.css adaptions properly.

Also when I change the theme in the same session to the custom theme the custom.css is loaded.

Unfortunateley the custom.css is not loaded when I refresh the page.

Does anybody have a solution or an idea how to solve that issue.

After reloading the launchpad with already selected custom theme:

After changing the theme in the same session in the settings:

Kind regards,

Eike

entry.title: Upgrade for FIORI 6.0 - backend dependencies.
entry.content:
Hi

I'm planning migration our FES from 2.0 for 6.0 in Netweaver 7.4 with oracle database. The definition in Front end server was soft, I used the maintenance optimizer without problem.


The question is how can we check the dependencies in the back-end systems and watch we need update there.

I can notice that for hane environements we can Run the SAP Fiori Upgrade Impact Analysis.

I checkd many sap notes withou sucess to find this dependencies.

Can anybody help me please?


Regards

Marcos

entry.title: Filter by date in Advance search is not working without entry of Time
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

Here in the Advance search, I have created a search field called Ticket created Date.
that is working fine when I am filtering the exact time and date but according to my requirement, I need to filter only date.
Whenever I am using date without time filed (Hide) the Results are empty

Kindly help me using this reference pictures.


Regards,
Tanuja T.

entry.title: How to post date to odata of type edm.datetime from ui5 datepicker
entry.content:
Hi All,

i have an datepicker element at ui5 side which taking date in format 18 jul 2023 which is failing while posting to odata

odata has date format as ed.datetime.

please share your solution.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Tax provider services that can be linked to S4 HANA Cloud (4Q2)
entry.content:
Backgroud:

We need to link US state tax calculations with an external tax provider service to S4HC, and we know that S4HC provides BADI and settings for the linkage in the 4Q2 scope item.

Question:

We hope to know if there are ant specific tax provider services that can be linked to S4HC. Especially those services that have been proven effective in linkage with S4HC.

Please kindly inform us if you have any suggestion towards this issue.

entry.title: Spaces & Pages 2308
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can anyone confirm that the spaces & pages will be set as default in the upcoming 2308 release for both new and existing customers?

Thanks in Adv,
Guru Balan.

entry.title: Correct Last name for this user in user profile
entry.content: One of our SAP Learning users has incorrect/misspelled Last Name visible in her user profile. How can this be corrected?

entry.title: ACDOCA-KUNWE field w/ Interface provision
entry.content:
Dear Community

Business Partner Sold-to Customer from SD-Invoice is being written into ACDOCA-KUNNR (Debitor), at time of Finance Document Entry. Now, due to special requirements we aim to also write Ship-to Party information into target ACDOCA-KUNWE field, with the objective of later on sending data records via outbound interface. I believe we can manage to retrieve Ship-to Party from SD-Document (scenario A) and populate field value into target field KUNWE with document replication from S/4 Logistics system. However (and here comes the question) in scenario B, with data from Legacy Systems (Non SAP), CFIN S/4 system will not be receiving adequate Ship-to Party (no valid Business Partner ID) but the old legacy value for it. For the purpose of serving the outbound interface receiver this is fine and expected according to this (our own) design. However, would it 1) be possible even to write legacy values (via IDOC, or other medium) into KUNWE if not valid or will this fail due to validations and also 2) what would be good SAP practice in this mixed scenario of A and B ... Kindly advise.

Best regards,

Frank

entry.title: How can we convert story filter to page filter [Input control] in sac optimized design mode?
entry.content:
Optimized design Mode
I have create a story filter with the model variable but I can't convert that into page filter. Is there any way to convert??

entry.title: Fiori Cache cleanup after upgrade
entry.content:
We are upgrading from S/4 2021 to S/4 2022 (Embedded Fiori implementation). As a part of upgrade post activity we are clearing the Fiori cache in the below sequence.

  1. Meta data cache clear /n/IWFND/CACHE_CLEANUP
  2. UI2 Cache clear from report /UI2/DELETE_CACHE_AFTER_IMP
  3. Client cache clear from report /UI2/INVALIDATE_CLIENT_CACHES..(for all user)
  4. Report /UI5/APP_INDEX_CALCULATE
  5. Clear cache(/UI2/INVAL_CACHES)
  6. /UI2/CHIP_SYNCHRONIZE_CACHE

After clearing the cache I wasn’t able to use or load any app for initial 4-5 hours. It took lot of time to stabilize. In general there are lot of manual activities & sanity check we do after the upgrade which is all impacted due to this.

Do you think anyone of the above list shouldn't be considered? or Any suggestions and recommendations from your experience which you follow for cache cleanup after Fiori upgrade?

Thanks,

entry.title: How to setup VPN in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm seeking guidance on the process of configuring a VPN client and initiating a login on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

This inquiry arises from a client's request to ensure that only individuals with VPN access can successfully log into the system. In other words, access to their system should be restricted solely to those with VPN privileges, even if someone possesses knowledge of the login link, user ID, and password.

Your insights on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Best Regards,

Guru Balan.

entry.title: Number of records considered by a job
entry.content:
Hello,

Thanks in advance for reading.

I am having some jobs which are running for a total of 7 to 8 hours for the program FRE_C4 that has been launched in ECC.

I would like to understand the number of records processed by these job.

Could you please tell me a way that i could identify the number of orders/records considered by this job.

Thank you in advance.

Nikhil

entry.title: How to Hide Fiori app in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently working on SAP S/4HANA public cloud edition and have a requirement to assign the "Create Purchase Order - ME21N" tile to one of the business user. To achieve this, we've assigned the corresponding catalog, specifically the "SAP_MM_BC_PO_PROCESS_MC." However, within this business catalog, there are numerous applications available, such as "Create Document." Consequently, the system grants the user access to all the apps within that catalog. Our intention is to restrict the user from using any app other than "Create Purchase Order." Despite enabling spaces and pages, the user is still able to access the "Create Document" app by searching for its name in the search box. We'd greatly appreciate your swift response and assistance with this matter.

Thanks in Advance,

Guru Balan.

entry.title: How to render HTML in labels of Custom Fields and Quote Tables?
entry.content:
To render HTML in cart line item descriptions - simply customize the responsive template "Cart_Sections/ItemsTable" by changing
<span data-bind="text: itemDescription.description">
to
<span data-bind="html: itemDescription.description">

However, this simple trick does not work in templates "Cart_Templates/CartTableTemplate" and "Cart_Templates/CartCustomFieldTemplates" to make the Quote Table and Custom Field labels render HTML.

Anyone know how to do this?

entry.title: List of Customers By Sales Rep or Territory
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new to SAP but have an extensive knowledge of a much simpler ERP system (Microsoft Navision) so I consider myself fairly resourceful when it comes to navigating and learning ERP's.

Unfortunately, I don't currently have the greatest support network or teachers around me to help me through the steep learning curve of SAP.

I'm trying to find a list of customers filtered down to an assigned sales rep. I've been told by my organisation that I should have access in SAP to this data but wasn't told how to find it.

I'm also finding a lot of the transaction codes that have been posted on here in other threads regarding this same issue are blocked transactions by permissions set by my organisation.

Please help.

Also, presumably there are 'out of the box' t-codes that come with SAP, but organizations can create their own based on specific needs in addition to the 'out of the box' t-codes - is there a t-code that will show all available t-codes within my organization? I need to also extract sales and transaction history for groups of customers.

Appreciate any help!

entry.title: Customizing Layout (VA02) Create Sales Order Window
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new to SAP.

Looking for ways to speed up data entry by customizing the layout in my sales inquiry windows such as the window in transactions like "Create Quotation" and "Create Sales Order".

I've discovered how to customize the line items box to move unessential fields out of view - but one thing that is bugging me is the limited size of the box where you enter line items.

Currently I can only see 3 lines on screen at any given point before having to scroll - is there anyway to expand this box to show more lines on screen at once?

Thank you,

entry.title: Unable to Remove field using Adapt UI in "My Purchase Requisition - New" App.
entry.content:
adapt-ui-selection.jpgDear Experts,

We are trying to Adapt UI for "My Purchase Requisition - New" App.

The Requirement of the Business is as follows: Hide the Material Valuation Details from the App Main screen as well as from the screen once you select and enter a Purchase Requisition to maintain price confidentiality. Kindly find the attached screenshot "Valuation Price" in which the Field to be hidden/removed is marked in Red. valuation-price.jpg

Current Status: We have been successful in Removing the Valuation Details from the Purchase Requisition Details Screens but are unable to remove it from the Main Screen of the App, After you press "Right click" the only available option is to "Rearrange Toolbar" and it does not contain any Table Headers which need to be hidden/removed. Kindly find the attached screenshot "Adapt UI Selection".

Can someone guide us on how to hide the valuation data from the Main screen Table.

entry.title: UI Integartion card chart and table data in single card
entry.content:
Hi All,

our requirement develop the UI integration cards and deploy into BTP workzone site.

when we go through the card explorer documentation, there are predefined templates(Example: list card, analytical card, table card).

But there are no standard templates available in documentation for different types of templates in single card.

How can we show both the chart and table data in single UI integration card ? Is it possible ?

entry.title: How to implement sorting and filtering options for UI Integration cards
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to implement sorting and filtering options for table card with external buttons on UI integartion cards.

Post development of these cards we are accessing from BTP workzone site.

In the below blog in step5 it is showing as dropdown for filter option.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/appstudio-sapui5-integrationcard-create.html

Instead of dropdown for filter can we show with external button or any table column level sorting, filtering features available for these UI integration cards like our UI5 applications ?

entry.title: How to Change Layout from Default to User Specific
entry.content:
Hello , 

some users created layouts in various transactions with the Default option rather than User-Specific.

Now we have many Default Layouts while most of them should be User-Specific.

Can I mass select the Layouts I want and mark them from default to User-Specific? 

How can i do this mass Change ?

Thanks
